category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates LittleFS images for ESP8266, ESP32, Pico RP2040, and RP2350; official README says it builds and unpacks littlefs images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mklittlefs; official GitHub README title is mklittlefs.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage, build, and LittleFS configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/earlephilhower/mklittlefs; per instruction, repo is not re-evaluated and returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README describes creating, unpacking, listing, and configuring LittleFS images.
